webrtc_peer_manager_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual webrtc_peer_manager_config_t(3)

NAME

webrtc_peer_manager_config_t - Peer manager configuration.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/webrtc/peer_manager.h>

Data Fields

Called when DataChannel ready. webrtc_gathering_timeout_callback_t on_gathering_timeout
Called when ICE gathering times out. void * user_data
Passed to callbacks. crypto_context_t * crypto_ctx
Crypto context for transports.

Detailed Description

Peer manager configuration.
